response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of 15 years of focused AI/cloud engineering leadership, has a current career gap, and no advanced degree in AI — key requirements for this director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Broad technical fluency across cloud, infrastructure, and multiple languages including DLang and TypeScript
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 raises red flags for sustained senior engagement
No demonstrable AI product or platform built at scale with measurable impact
Lacks Master’s/PhD in AI and no clear track record of strategic cloud-AI leadership
